list.name: traceID
list.label: Trace ID
list.description: Paste a traceID from logs (look for `trace_id=...` in service logs or the Loki dashboard) to render its full span timeline below.

options.content:
**Paste a traceID** into the variable above to render its full call graph in the **Trace by ID** panel. Find traceIDs by:

- Searching the **Recent Traces** table below (TraceQL `{}` returns most recent spans across all services).
- Looking in service logs for `trace_id=...` (emitted by the OpenTelemetry javaagent's MDC integration). Try the [Loki Logs dashboard](/grafana/d/digit-loki) and grep for `trace_id`.
- Following a Loki log line's **trace** link (datasource `tracesToLogsV2` is wired by `trace_id` field).

Datasource: `Tempo` (`P214B5B846CF3925F`) at `http://tempo:3200`. Tempo retains traces per its compactor settings (default ~48h on-disk).

panels.title: Services with traces (last 30m)
panels.description: Count of distinct service.name values in Tempo's tag index. Confirms which Java services are exporting OTLP successfully.

options.content:
**Receiver flow**: Java services → `digit-otel-collector` (OTLP gRPC :4317) → `digit-tempo` (OTLP gRPC :4317, host :13200).

**Quick checks** (from a host with shell access):

```bash
# Recent search via Tempo HTTP API
curl -sG http://localhost:13200/api/search?limit=5 | jq '.traces[] | {traceID, rootServiceName, durationMs}'

# List services that have traces
curl -sG http://localhost:13200/api/search/tag/service.name/values | jq

# Lookup a specific trace
curl -sG http://localhost:13200/api/traces/{TRACE_ID} | jq '.batches | length'
```

panels.title: Recent traces (TraceQL: {} )
panels.description: Most recent spans across all services. Click a row to open the trace timeline.

panels.title: Trace by ID — ${traceID}
panels.description: Renders the full span tree for the traceID above. Empty when no traceID is provided.

panels.title: Slow traces — duration > 500ms (last range)
panels.description: Surfaces traces whose total duration exceeds 500ms across all services. Click a row to drill in.

panels.title: Error traces (status = error)
panels.description: Spans flagged as errors by the instrumentation (HTTP 5xx, exceptions, manual error status).
